# Figma Community - Top Dashboard UI Kits

**Source:** https://www.figma.com/community/ui-kits/dashboards (tag /dashboard/files redirects here)
**Scraped:** 2026-04-21
**Scope:** top 43 free/paid dashboard UI kits sorted by popularity
**License:** Each Figma community file carries its own license - usually Free for personal/commercial but NOT for resale of template-as-product. Every designer credited per-item.

Figma source is accessible via `figma.com/community/file/<fileKey>/<slug>` (requires a free Figma account to duplicate). File key + preview-image URL are what we captured. `s3-figma-hubfile-images-production.figma.com/...` hosts the carousel hero for each file.

## Top 10 Clawmachine-fit picks

Ranked by dark-fidelity + data-dense + fork-count:

1. **Material UI for Figma (and MUI X)** (`file/912837788133317724`) - 441K duplicates. Pre-made essentials including MUI X DataGrid, DatePickers, Charts. By MUI + 2 others. Free. **Top anchor** if moving to MUI-based React.
2. **Untitled UI - FREE v2.0** (`file/1020079203222518115`) - 323K. By Jordan Hughes. Free. Canonical baseline kit that predates most of these.
3. **Dashboard UI Kit - Dashboard, Free Admin Dashboard** (`file/1210542873091115123`) - 170K. By ByeWind. Free. ByeWind is the most prolific dashboard designer on Figma.
4. **59 Charts UI Responsive Components (Chart.js, Chartist, ApexCharts, Recharts)** (`file/1136725187967938411`) - 98.6K. By Iago Sousa. Free. **Highly relevant** - Clawmachine is explicitly going to render charts; this is the reference.
5. **Dashboard Design System** (`file/1181054157767467767`) - 36.1K. By ByeWind. Free. Sibling to above.
6. **Snow Dashboard UI Kit** (`file/1168811417705255214`) - 41.9K. By ByeWind. Free. Snow = the paid-tier variant (`file/1301133540593408882`, $59).
7. **SnowUI Design System** (`file/1388431032861751537`) - 11K. By ByeWind. Free. Full DS sibling of the Snow kit.
8. **Metrix SaaS Dashboard UI Kit** (`file/1149477096761797772`) - 29.9K. By Usman Ndako. Free.
9. **Power BI UI Kit** (`file/1221509435701072015`) - 29.7K. By Robert Janezic. Free.
10. **Tesla Dashboard UI Component Library** (`file/1382192547846546595`) - 4.1K. By Nami. Free. Interesting outlier for visual-identity stitch - Tesla-UI-vocab fits the "industrial reseller workstation" vibe.

## Also noted

- **Myna UI - Tailwind + Shadcn + Radix Premium UI Kit** (`file/1340017605248937608`) - 23.6K. By Praveen Juge. Free. Direct Shadcn-in-Figma bridge.
- **Tableau UI Kit** - Two variants, `file/1049839808166473920` (Robert Janezic, 18.6K) + `file/1014921671801168661` (Designforbi, 12.7K). Both free.
- **Maglo - Financial Management Web UI Kit** (`file/1496029882992276524`) - 5.2K. By UIHut-Official. Free.
- **Charts & Widgets Figma UI Kit | BRIX Agency** (`file/1515101685318142189`) - 4.5K. Free. Same BRIX as the Webflow templates.
- **Sales & Business Intelligence Dashboard** (`file/1353812582622399977`) - 2.9K. By UI Camp + 1.
- **SmartCharts UI Kit** (`file/1496043553018478640`) - 3.8K. By Sanduni Ravishara.
- **Apple iOS 26 Library** (`file/1514848256772942885`) - 15K. By KK. Free. (visual-antithesis per repo CLAUDE.md; do not carry forward)
- **Figma UI Kit for AI Agent Chat Apps (Freemium)** (`file/1496647384826493443`) - 2.9K. By Armando Qose.

## Notes

- No screenshots downloaded - the carousel hero images on s3-figma-hubfile-images-production are watermark-free but not locally mirrored to stay under size budget and fair-use bounds. Preview URLs are in `metadata.json`.
- To open any file: visit `figma.com/community/file/<fileKey>/<slug>` - requires Figma account (free tier OK).
- The `resource_type=files&editor_type=figma` query param pins to full design files (excludes wireframes and widgets).
